title: More Shearable Mobs
description: Lets you shear the four main farm animals for their resources and consumables
body:
# More Shearable Mobs

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6Nphk8Oeu5U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Shears suck! Maybe I can fix that

More Shearable Mobs lets you shear more than just sheep. With this mod, you can shear cows, chickens, pigs, and even sheep for **resources AND meat**! No more killing your hard-earned flock.

Simply shear once to obtain a mob's material, then shear again to obtain their meat.

**Features:**

* **Shear Cows** for *leather* and *beef*
* **Shear Chickens** for *feathers* and *chicken*
* **Shear Pigs** for *porkchops*
* **Shear Sheep** for *mutton* in addition to their wool

Each animal has fully custom-modeled skins for their sheared and butchered states, giving clear visual feedback as you harvest resources.

![Space Skeleton Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bb8448bba4e7fe3c3c2ad2db1e67f7c4132cc94_0.webp)

After being sheared or butchered, the animal will eventually regenerate its meat and resources. How humane!

![Space Skinned Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f80643f5b3f7784a16fd873c5054c7e5c0c6d80_0.webp)

Note that mob drops have also been modified such that **killing a sheared animal will only drop meat**. As well, killing a butchered animal will drop bones.

Compatible with most vanilla-styled modpacks (probably). Requires Fabric.

Enjoy!

Also if you run into any bugs please let me know! You can subit issues on the mod's repository page on GitHub (click the View Source button ;)
